name: private bind rejects a verse account already claimed by another qq
description: 验证同一个 verse 账号被其他 QQ 占用时，私聊绑定会直接拒绝，防止误绑和串号。

seed_sql: INSERT INTO players (id, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (99001, 'ClaimedUser', 'active', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

INSERT INTO bot_account_bindings (id, bot_platform, bot_user_id, game_platform, player_id, account_key, display_name, is_active, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (99002, 'qq', '20001', '2048verse', 99001, 'claimed_user', 'claimed_user', 1, '{}', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

expected.reply: 该 verse 账号已绑定到其他 QQ，请先解绑或联系管理员。

name: group bind command is private only
description: 验证群里尝试绑定账号会被直接拦截，避免群内误绑别人的 verse 账号。

expected.reply: 绑定仅限私聊，请私聊 bot 发送：绑定 你的verse用户名

name: private unbind clears the current verse binding
description: 验证已绑定用户可以在私聊里主动解绑，方便纠错和重新绑定。

seed_sql: INSERT INTO players (id, display_name, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (99003, 'BoundUser', 'active', '2026-06-03 09:00:00', '2026-06-03 09:00:00');

name: admin can manually unbind a qq account in hub
description: 验证管理员可以在 Hub 里手动解绑某个 QQ 账号，方便处理误绑和纠错。

args.text: 解绑用户 bot_user_id=20004 reason=误绑
